human.name: Human
human.homeland: Stonewatch and the village roads of central Valerion
human.lore: Humans hold the middle roads of Valerion, the folk most often asked to keep a wall manned, a ledger balanced, and a promise alive for one more season.

passive.name: Adaptable Spirit
passive.description: Humans are known for taking up whatever duty keeps the line from breaking, whether that duty is steel, trade, or quiet mediation.

elf.name: Elf
elf.homeland: The older ward-paths along Valewood's outer reaches
elf.lore: Elves keep long memory and careful watch, treating old ward-lines, treetop paths, and oath-marked clearings as duties inherited rather than scenery admired.

passive.name: Keen Senses
passive.description: Elves are famed for patient aim, quiet movement, and the discipline to read danger before it reaches the line.

elf.summary: +2 Agility, +1 Wisdom, +1 Archery, +1 Stealth, +1 Tracking, +1 Focus

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.homeland: Ironridge Hold and the road-cut passes below it
dwarf.lore: Dwarves speak of a wall, gate, or oath as something meant to outlive the people currently standing it, and that belief shapes everything from their roads to their grudges.

passive.name: Stonecunning
passive.description: Dwarves read weak masonry, sound foundations, and practical workmanship almost on instinct.

dwarf.summary: +1 Strength, +1 Vitality, +1 Endurance, +2 Max HP, +1 Defense, +1 Crafting

ashenborn.name: Ashenborn
ashenborn.homeland: Shrine March and the scarred road east of the old wards
ashenborn.lore: Ashenborn descend from families that endured shrine-fall and ember weather without abandoning the realm, carrying uneasy familiarity with ruins others only fear.

passive.name: Ember Intuition
passive.description: Ashenborn carry a restless sense for unstable wards, cinder-haunted ruins, and sacred places gone wrong.

ashenborn.summary: +1 Mind, +1 Wisdom, +1 Luck, +1 Spellcasting, +1 Stealth, +1 Arcana, +1 Focus

marshfolk.name: Marshfolk
marshfolk.homeland: The reed roads and low ferries west of Stormbreak
marshfolk.lore: Marshfolk learn early that a realm stays passable only if someone knows which ground holds, which current lies, and which danger is patient enough to wait in fog.

passive.name: Bogstride
passive.description: Marshfolk move confidently through wet ground and uncertain footing that slows less practiced travelers.

marshfolk.summary: +1 Agility, +1 Endurance, +1 Wisdom, +1 Luck, +2 Survival, +1 Stealth, +1 Beast Handling

stonekin.name: Stonekin
stonekin.homeland: The quarry vales sworn to Ironridge's outer works
stonekin.lore: Stonekin trace their line to quarry camps and holdfast laborers who treated endurance as the first oath any road-builder owes the realm.

passive.name: Granite Poise
passive.description: Stonekin are hard to panic and harder to move once they decide a line must be held.

stonekin.summary: +2 Vitality, +1 Endurance, +1 Wisdom, +2 Max HP, +1 Defense, +1 Lore, +1 Crafting

sunforged.name: Sunforged
sunforged.homeland: The marcher temples and fire-camps of old Valerion
sunforged.lore: Sunforged bloodlines preserve older martial vows, treating courage, command, and public duty as visible obligations rather than private virtues.

passive.name: Emberheart
passive.description: Sunforged cultures prize resolve under pressure and the kind of presence that keeps frightened people standing.

sunforged.summary: +1 Strength, +1 Endurance, +2 Charisma, +1 Swordsmanship, +1 Persuasion, +1 Intimidation, +2 Gold

tideborn.name: Tideborn
tideborn.homeland: Stormbreak and the ferry-covenants of the western coast
tideborn.lore: Tideborn keep Valerion's coast by reading tide, wind, and oath-bound harbor law as parts of the same duty: if the shore fails, the realm loses one more line of return.

passive.name: Tidememory
passive.description: Tideborn culture teaches weather sense, harbor discipline, and the calm needed to keep a route open when the sea turns hostile.

tideborn.summary: +1 Agility, +1 Mind, +1 Wisdom, +1 Charisma, +1 Survival, +1 Spellcasting, +1 Barter, +1 Beast Handling, +1 Focus

hollowborn.name: Hollowborn
hollowborn.homeland: Vaultreach and the grave vales kept under old shrine wards
hollowborn.lore: Hollowborn families come from quiet valleys where memory, mourning, and ward-keeping are treated as sacred labor without which the realm's dead would never stay at peace.

passive.name: Grave-Sense
passive.description: Hollowborn notice wrongness in abandoned sanctums, burial wards, and places where memory has been profaned.

hollowborn.summary: +1 Mind, +2 Wisdom, +1 Luck, +1 Lore, +1 Spellcasting, +1 Warding, +1 Relic Lore, +1 Focus

emberkin.name: Emberkin
emberkin.homeland: Emberfall and the ashward cloisters beneath its watch-fires
emberkin.lore: Emberkin descend from ward-families who swore never to let the ash roads fall unwatched, shaping lives around sacred duty, carried flame, and the discipline to stand where other folk retreat.

passive.name: Ashward Oath
passive.description: Emberkin endure heat, fear, and shrine pressure with a steadiness born from generations of sworn watch.

emberkin.summary: +1 Strength, +1 Mind, +1 Wisdom, +1 Endurance, +1 Arcana, +1 Warding, +1 Intimidation, +1 Relic Lore, +1 Focus

valewalker.name: Valewalker
valewalker.homeland: Valewood and the hidden ward-roads under its canopy
valewalker.lore: Valewalkers are born to the deep wood lines where ward-stones, game trails, and hidden hearth-oaths all serve the same purpose: keep Valerion's living wilds from slipping into ruin.

passive.name: Greenward Step
passive.description: Valewalkers move with practiced respect through living wards, game paths, and border-woods others would only blunder through.

valewalker.summary: +1 Agility, +2 Wisdom, +1 Endurance, +1 Tracking, +1 Survival, +1 Stealth, +1 Beast Handling

auric.name: Auric
auric.homeland: The marcher keeps and oath-halls that once answered directly to old Valerion
auric.lore: Auric lines trace back to marcher stewards who believed the realm survives only while someone still honors the gold-bound oath to hold the line for people they may never meet.

passive.name: Gilded Vow
passive.description: Auric tradition prizes oathkeeping, public command, and the resolve to make duty visible when fear starts to spread.

auric.summary: +1 Strength, +1 Endurance, +1 Charisma, +1 Wisdom, +1 Swordsmanship, +1 Warding, +1 Intimidation, +1 Barter, +2 Gold
